plain_english: This is a generic import/path diagnostic. It can target any scoped engine name or Python file path. It does not edit files; it only probes whether imports/tests fail because of environment path behavior or file/package structure.

probe_strategy.if_python_file: run py_compile on the file; if file is a test file, run it with scoped PYTHONPATH additions
probe_strategy.if_engine_or_directory: run the first discovered test-like Python file with cwd at the engine directory and PYTHONPATH including engine dir, engines root, and AI.Web root

recommendation: Run import-probe-run latest CONFIRM_RUN_IMPORT_PROBE. Use stack_linker_breather as the first target, but this tool is generic.
